nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy. Low around 60, with temperatures rising to around 65 overnight. East wind around 1 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws.name: Friday
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy. High near 83, with temperatures falling to around 81 in the afternoon. East wind 2 to 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

nws.name: Friday Night
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy. Low around 60, with temperatures rising to around 62 overnight. Northeast wind 2 to 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

nws.name: Independence Day
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly sunny, with a high near 84. Northeast wind around 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws.name: Saturday Night
nws.shortForecast: Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Mostly Clear
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms before 7pm. Mostly clear, with a low around 62. Southeast wind around 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws.name: Sunday
nws.detailedForecast: Sunny, with a high near 91. South wind 5 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph.

nws.name: Sunday Night
nws.shortForecast: Partly Cloudy then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms after 1am. Partly cloudy, with a low around 66. Southeast wind 9 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph.

nws.name: Monday
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly sunny, with a high near 88. South wind 7 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 18 mph.

nws.name: Monday Night
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms. Partly cloudy, with a low around 62. Northeast wind 6 to 10 mph.

nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers before 1pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly sunny, with a high near 85. East wind 6 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph.

nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely before 7am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Partly sunny, with a high near 85. Southeast wind 8 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph.
